news.Title: Billionaire Bill Ackman Sold Alphabet and Bought the Dip in This Magnificent Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Instead

This move reflected Ackman's investment philosophy -- patient ...

news.Title: 台股多頭造就高報酬？他靠指數與正二年複合成長達20%　股民：正常發揮
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]實習記者王保伶／綜合報導

近年台股行情持續升高，讓不少投資人迅速累積資產。一名網友分享，自2021年進場以來，主要操作指數與正二產品，近5年的年化報酬約落在20%至21%。然而，這樣的成績讓他開始懷疑，「真的能這麼幸福嗎？」文章一出，引起網友熱烈討論。

原PO在 PTT股板 發文指出，自己於2021年進場並持續透過Excel記錄，並用XIRR公式計算複合年均成長率，近5年的績效落在20至21%左右。他指出，自己沒有將資金投入個股，而是多以指數、正二操作為主，並依據市場情況調整曝險與槓桿。雖然入市以來績效亮眼，但他擔心可能只是遇到好時機，開始思考未來的「報酬順序風險」，好奇如果不是在2021年後進場，是否還能達到同樣水準，因此發文詢問年複合成長20%是否只是近年市場特例。

文章曝光後，不少網友指出，近幾年台股確實強勢，「去年到現在拉很高，光0050從分割完最低46.5到現在96.5」、「正常」、「我本來預估七年翻一倍就好了，結果不到一年就一倍」、「大ai市場時代，市場在幫你」，有人則分享自己的年化報酬，「2020後超過20%簡單，只有22沒到，以前有10%就不錯」、「17年入市 ，年化48%路過」。

有人則指出，若從2021年起算，部分投資元大台灣50（0050）的報酬甚至更高，認為原PO未必真正勝過大盤，「你知道你放0050不動績效都比你忙進忙出好嗎」、「你這樣輸給0050喔！」、「回測0050，過去5年投資報酬率是27%供你參考」。不過，也有網友提醒，疫情後全球資金寬鬆，以及AI熱潮帶動，才造就這波超額報酬，未必代表長期趨勢，「真的常態的話，通膨早就爆炸了，珍惜這幾年吧」。

◎《FTNN新聞網》提醒您：本資料僅供參考，投資人應獨立判斷，審慎評估並自負投資風險。

news.Title: Citi resets Micron stock price target after an anomaly
news.Content: On May 18, Micron's stock fell nearly 6%. On the same morning, three major Wall Street firms turned more bullish on the stock simultaneously. That kind of split between the tape and the research desk does not happen often. Understanding why Citi nearly doubled its price target on a stock that just sold off sharply requires understanding something specific about how the memory market is moving right now. What Citi changed on Micron and the analyst behind the call Citi analyst Atif Malik raised his price target on Micron Technology to $840 from $425 on May 19, maintaining a Buy ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Citi analyst Atif Malik nearly doubled Micron's (MU) stock price target to $840 from $425, maintaining a Buy rating.
• The upgrade is driven by Micron's planned 40% DRAM price increase in Q2, following Samsung's 100% increase in Q1.
• Citi raised its FY2026 EPS estimate by 10% to $58.46.
• The bull case is based on a DRAM upcycle extending into 2027, supported by standard DRAM pricing and high-bandwidth memory (HBM) demand.
• Other firms like HSBC and Melius Research also raised their price targets, indicating strong analyst conviction despite a recent stock dip.
news.Keywords: price target hike, DRAM, HBM, memory market, analyst conviction

news.Title: 錯過台積電大漲又輸大盤！上班族想靠波段操作超車　網直言：乖乖買0050
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]實習記者林子云／綜合報導

台股持續大漲，讓不少投資人開始檢視自己的操盤績效。近日一名上班族網友在網路上發文請益，坦言自己平時工作繁忙，想嘗試做波段操作，沒想到反而錯過了這波大漲走勢，自身投資績效僅約20%，慘輸大盤，因此想詢問大家的投資建議。

原PO在PTT發文表示，自己先前看到其他文章提醒「若績效輸大盤，就不要自以為是進進出出」，讓他開始反思自己的投資策略，卻也困惑若照這個投資邏輯，為何股版每天仍因漲跌激動不已？他坦言，其實一直在等台積電跌，卻每次都跌了兩三天又漲回去，結果頻頻錯過買點。因此他詢問，自己究竟應該直接投入大盤，還是要多加練習讓績效超越大盤？

貼文曝光後，多數網友建議如果長期操作績效不如大盤，應該回歸最簡單的投資策略，「輸大盤就乖乖買0050」、「長期很難贏大盤啦，而且進進出出會錯失不少漲幅」；也有人認為，股版喊漲喊跌大部分只是情緒宣洩，並不代表真的頻繁操作，「很多人只是喊喊而已」、「不是每個人都堅定全倉指數，大多還是想打敗大盤，全倉指數也沒規定不能出來喊燒」。

不過，有另一派網友認為，買個股做波段依舊有機會戰勝大盤，只是難度與風險相對較高。也有網友指出「短期贏大盤很容易，但長期要贏就很難」，並舉例若能精準抓住記憶體、被動元件、光通訊等強勢族群的飆股行情，整體的投資報酬率確實有可能遠遠超越大盤指數。

◎《FTNN新聞網》提醒您：本資料僅供參考，投資人應獨立判斷，審慎評估並自負投資風險。

news.Title: Prediction: Rivian Stock Could Soar in the Next 3 Years If These 2 Things Happen
news.Content:
Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) is attempting to follow Tesla 's (NASDAQ: TSLA) path. First, introduce a high-end vehicle; then ramp up production; introduce a mass-market vehicle; and then focus on profitability. Rivian is preparing to introduce a mass-market vehicle in 2026 to attract less-affluent customers to its brand. This could be a big turning point for the company.

Rivian has made big strides

Tesla basically created the electric vehicle (EV) market , so it didn't face any material competition as it worked through its business plans. Rivian has had to contend with Tesla, other EV start-ups, and major automakers, all of which have entered the space in some capacity. And yet Rivian has reached the point where it is ready to introduce a mass-market vehicle, the R2, in 2026.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Notably, Rivian turned a gross profit in 2025. That isn't the same as positive earnings, but it means that the carmaker produced more revenue from selling its cars than it cost to produce them. It is the first step toward positive earnings and highlights the company's manufacturing success.

The two big things that need to happen now

It will take several quarters to see how well received the R2 is by customers. But if sales are brisk, the company will take the next big step toward becoming sustainably profitable. Investors should be watching this product launch closely because it could make or break Rivian's business.

Assuming the R2 launch goes well, Rivian will be able to ramp up production and spread its costs across more vehicles. Having already proven it can turn a gross profit on its manufacturing operations, the costs to cover now are research and development, and sales, general, and administrative costs. R&D costs should come down after R2 is in production, so the nut to crack could be smaller than it appears.

Assuming Rivian generates positive earnings, the stock would likely rocket higher. A string of positive quarters would likely propel the shares even further. Investors monitoring the company's income statement should continue to do so, because that's where the second big stock catalyst will appear.

This is Rivian's time to shine

The next three years will be pivotal to Rivian's future. If the R2 launch is strong and the company turns a profit, the sky could be the limit for the stock. That said, only more aggressive investors should probable buy Rivian, since falling short of these two things could turn the shares into an investment dud.

Story Continues

news.Title: The 1 Tech Stock I Keep Adding To on Red Days -- and Why I'll Do It Again
news.Content:
Tech stocks have been some of the best performers in the entire stock market. The State Street Technology Select Sector SPDR ETF has gained more than 150% over the past five years, while the S&P 500 is only up by a little more than 75% over the same stretch.

That's the power of the tech sector, and with some stocks performing better than others, digging for underrated picks and buying dips can be quite rewarding. I have been steadily accumulating Netlist (OTC: NLST) amid pullbacks and will keep doing so. Here's what makes the tech stock special.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

An AI stock with a legal lottery ticket

Netlist is a unique artificial intelligence (AI) stock . Not only does it have rising hardware sales like other picks, but it's also winning legal battles against memory chipmakers Micron and Samsung . Netlist has key patents that are fundamental for high-performance memory chips and DDR5 memory modules that have become hot commodities amid the AI boom.

Not only can Netlist win settlements, but it might also be eligible for licensing royalties, similar to its deal with SK Hynix . While the court battles are ongoing, Netlist has won verdicts against both companies over patent right violations.

The jury verdicts from Micron and Samsung alone are worth almost Netlist's entire market cap. However, Netlist can also negotiate licensing deals, and the longer the two memory chipmakers drag their feet in this case, the more consequential the damages may become.

Micron and Samsung continue to sell out of memory chips amid booming demand. Impressive financial growth and vast backlogs have turned those two stocks into top performers, but issues with Netlist patents can strangle all of those sales. Netlist can issue an injunction that bans the sale of these memory chips in the U.S., ruining backlogs in the process. Netlist followed a similar playbook with SK Hynix and eventually signed a licensing deal.

Netlist gets far more negotiating power as the AI boom continues, which can result in better licensing terms. This small company has silently become a major part of the AI bottleneck due to its patents. Any meaningful progress or updates regarding court cases can create sharp volatility for the stock.

Netlist isn't just relying on legal outcomes

As exciting as the legal lottery ticket component of Netlist's stock is, that's not the only reason I'm building my position on red days. The company has tangible revenue and net income growth that stems from its own memory products.

Story Continues

It makes sense that the company with foundational patents for key parts of the AI boom also knows how to create its own products in the industry. Netlist CEO C.K. Hong told investors in its Q1 2026 press release that the company "remain[s] well positioned to capitalize on AI memory technologies -- DDR5 and HBM -- through our products and IP assets."

The numbers certainly back up Hong's claim. Net sales reached $104.9 million, marking a 262% year-over-year improvement. The company also flipped to profitability, reporting $8.6 million in net income compared to a $9.5 million loss in the same quarter last year.

The $104.9 million in revenue also represents a 38.6% sequential improvement. That comes after Netlist reported $75.7 million in Q4 2025 sales, which was a 79% sequential improvement.

Consecutive quarters of high sequential growth can be an indicator of a breakout AI stock. It follows the pattern of Sandisk and Micron, which delivered multiple quarters of high sequential growth before most investors noticed the opportunity.

Netlist is up to two consecutive quarters of high sequential growth. The company didn't offer any quantitative guidance after sharing Q1 results, other than optimistic remarks. While investors may have liked some insights about Q2 numbers, it's the same approach Netlist took when it shared Q4 2025 results. Netlist hasn't been mentioning exact revenue guidance ranges as other corporations do, but that hasn't stopped the small AI company from delivering exceptional revenue growth in recent quarters.

If Netlist continues to deliver high sequential growth and scores big legal wins that result in licensing royalties, its stock should soar. That's why the growth stock looks attractive on red days.

Why StubHub Holdings Stock Crushed it This Week
news.Content:
A dramatic change in one analyst's opinion of StubHub (NYSE: STUB) took the stock well higher in recent trading days. According to data compiled by S&P Global Market Intelligence , StubHub's shares clocked a gain of over 13% this week.

A fence-sitter becomes a bull

That professional StubHub watcher was Guggenheim's Curry Baker. On Tuesday, the prognosticator raised his rating on the company's equity to buy from his previous neutral. His price target is $12.50 per share.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Baker's new bullish outlook stems from several recent developments, according to reports. The first is his opinion that StubHub has "reset" investor expectations not only for the remainder of this year but also for the following twelve months. He also feels the company will do better than many expect in advertising and its direct-issuance primary ticketing business.

On top of that, Baker wrote that high-profile live events coming soon will be a boon for StubHub, not least next year's soccer World Cup, which will be played across various venues throughout the U.S. The analyst also waxed positive on the regulatory environment, which he believes is becoming more favorable to the company, and its strong cash flow generation.

Fading experiences?

In addition to these factors, I'd include StubHub's embrace of next-generation technology to help its business, specifically its recently announced collaboration with leading artificial intelligence (AI) developer Anthropic .

That said, I feel we're passing the peak of Experience Commerce, where consumers prioritize one-off events like live shows and sports over material objects. If the economy starts to slow, many will jettison these types of purchases, which won't be good for ticketing companies. I'd stay on the sidelines with StubHub because of this.

news.Title: Microsoft vs. Apple Stock: The Numbers Reveal a Clear Winner Heading Into H2 2026
news.Content:
Among the Magnificent Seven, Microsoft and Apple are not just heavyweights. They are the fight card.

Both are trillion-dollar tech giants that significantly shape how people live and work, and both remain major forces in the ongoing AI-driven market trend. But while they are often pitted against each other, their businesses are actually very different- and that’s what we’re looking to figure out today.

More News from Barchart

2 Warren Buffett Stocks That Pay You a Passive Income

Why Wall Street Thinks This Dividend Stock Could Jump 30%

Our exclusive Barchart Brief newsletter is your FREE midday guide to what's moving stocks, sectors, and investor sentiment - delivered right when you need the info most. Subscribe today!

So, between MSFT and AAPL, which stock looks like the better buy as we go into the second half of 2026?

Microsoft (MSFT)

The first Magnificent Seven company is Microsoft Corp ., one of the world’s largest tech giants, with verticals spanning software, cloud computing, gaming, professional networking, and artificial intelligence. Best known for its Windows operating system, Microsoft is also behind some of the leading tech brands, including Office, Teams, Azure, LinkedIn, and Xbox, which are used by consumers, businesses, and governments worldwide.

Microsoft sits at a market cap of ~$3.1 trillion, and its stock has traded between $356 and $555 over the past 52 weeks. Today, its trading somewhere in the middle of that range, though the stock is down 13% YTD.

Apple (AAPL)

Next in the Magnificent Seven matchup is Apple Inc ., another technology giant that has built one of the world's most powerful ecosystems. It is best known for the iPhone, but it also has a strong, wide product portfolio that includes Macs, iPads, Apple Watches, AirPods, and software services. The result? An “Apple ecosystem”, in which these products work closely together, making it easier for customers to stay within the brand once they are already using it.

Apple’s dominance helped the company achieve a market cap of $4.4 trillion. Over the past 52 weeks, the stock traded between $193 and $304, and at the time of writing, it’s trading at the high end of that range. AAPL stock is also up 12% year-to-date.

That gives Apple the edge, at least in upside gained since the year started. But does that make it the better buy?

To answer that, we have to dig deeper.

Comparing revenue models: Microsoft vs Apple

Microsoft and Apple are both tech giants, but they make money in very different ways.

Microsoft’s income stream comes mainly from software, cloud services, business tools, gaming, and AI-related products. As an early tech innovator, it has products deeply integrated into workplaces, from Windows and Office to Teams, Azure, and LinkedIn, which gives the company a steady revenue from the different tools that businesses rely on every day.

Story Continues

Apple, meanwhile, makes most of its money from consumer technology. The iPhone remains its most important product, but the company also sells Macs, iPads, Apple Watches, AirPods, and a growing services business that includes iCloud, Apple Music, Apple TV+, AppleCare, and App Store-related revenue.

Financial comparisons

Now let’s look at their latest reported quarterly numbers:

Metric

Microsoft

Apple

Sales

$82.89 billion

$111.18 billion

Net Income

$31.78 billion

$29.58 billion

Forward P/E

24.91x

34.19x

Right off the bat, Microsoft reported less revenue than Apple, though it keeps more of it. Based on these values, Microsoft’s net margin is 38%, while Apple's is just below 27%. Don’t get me wrong, both of these are strong margins. However, Microsoft remains more notable, primarily due to its focus on software and cloud subscription services, which are traditionally high-margin businesses.

Microsoft’s lead also extends to its valuation, with a forward P/E at just under 25x, well below Apple’s ~34x. This means that investors are paying less per dollar of Microsoft’s expected earnings than they are for Apple’s. It does not automatically make Microsoft the better stock, but it does make Microsoft more attractive.

Overall, Microsoft appears to have better fundamentals.

Dividend narrative

A company’s financial health is one thing, but being able to pay dividends is another.

At the time of publication, Microsoft has a 24-year streak of dividend increases, a year shy of becoming a Dividend Aristocrat. It pays $3.64 per share yearly, translating to a yield of around 0.87%

Meanwhile, Apple's streak is lower, with 14 years of consecutive dividend increases. It pays a forward annual dividend of $1.08, translating to a yield of approximately 0.36%, which is also lower than Microsoft’s.

What does Wall Street think?

Microsoft’s dominance reflects Wall Street’s consensus: 48 analysts rate MSFT stock a “Strong Buy,” with mean and high targets suggesting 32%-62% upside potential.

Meanwhile, a consensus among 42 analysts rates AAPL stock a “Moderate Buy.” Its mean-to-high target prices suggest between 1% and 31% upside potential.

Verdict

Based on almost all objective data, Microsoft is the clear winner between these two stocks. It has the edge in performance, financials, dividends, analyst ratings, and high target prices- and everything that suggests it’s a better buy. Microsoft's dominant exposure in the AI sector will also support its continued growth, at least while the boom is ongoing. That said, I wouldn't shrug off Apple either. It is an innovative company that dominates the tech market by a wide margin, and its customers closely watch (and buy) its products released yearly… present company included.

news.Title: 科技盛宴 台股醞釀新一波狂歡
news.Content:
台股獲基本面、資金面力挺，回測月線後強力反彈。法人指出， 台北國際電腦展 、蘋果WWDC大會、Space X掛牌上市等科技盛事，將於6月上半月接踵而至，將有利多頭人氣匯聚，帶動指數再戰高點，甚至向50,000點靠攏。

群益投顧董事長蔡明彥、第一金投顧董事長黃詣庭分析，雖然美伊停火談判反覆，所幸國際油價下跌、10年期美債殖利率回落，台股受惠國際熱錢回籠，加上豐沛內資持續挹注，「假跌破」月線後上演大反攻戲碼，重登42,000點關卡。

統一投顧董事長黎方國、台新投顧總經理黃文清表示，台股多頭重新取得發球權，隨台北國際電腦展將於6月2日至5日登場，包括輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳兆元宴、超微（AMD）執行長蘇姿丰來台演說等題材，有利市場資金聚焦人工智慧（AI）浪潮。

蘋果WWDC預計6月9日至13日舉行，除iOS 27、iPadOS 27等系統更新外，傳出Mac、iPad、Apple TV等硬體新品亦將發表，鴻海（2317）、大立光等相關供應鏈蠢蠢欲動。

除此之外，Space X已進入IPO程序，近日昇達科、華通、信錦等台股相關衛星供應鏈股價整理後轉強，法人預期短線可望獲得市場追捧，但亦須提防資金排擠效應。

news.Title: 台股雙王領軍改寫四驚奇 外資強補761.3億元
news.Content:
美伊傳接近達成和平協議，帶動外資昨（22）日強補台股761.3億元，在權王台積電（2330）、股王信驊領攻下，終場漲899點收42,267點，並改寫集中市場收盤點位及市值、電子股指數創高、市值兆元股增至17檔等四大紀錄。

美伊和平協議露曙光，國際油價、美債殖利率回落，帶動市場風險偏好增溫，美股四大指數全數收紅，台股昨日開高走高收在相對高點，成交量擴至1.2兆元，連16日破兆元。

權王台積電（2330）漲25元收2,255元、股王信驊漲1,340元收17,780元，帶領多頭強勢攻高，千金股漲多跌少，仍維持49千金。

三大法人昨日共買超1,068.3億元，史上第三大。外資單日狂掃761.3億元，史上單日第四大，主要敲進華通、華邦電、力積電、鴻海等；5月來再度轉為買超709.8億元。外資在台指期留倉淨空單增加2,029口至46,483口。

投信在台股ETF淨贖回下仍買超112.2億元，連五買、累計加碼503.7億元；自營商買超194.7億元，歷來第六大，八大公股行庫逢高調節200.1億元。

台股集中市場昨日連二日拉出中長紅棒，寫四紀錄，首先是收在42,267點，超越5月7日的收盤41,933點；盤中高點42,357點差5月15日的最高42,408點僅約51點。其次，市值增加2.9兆至137.8兆元，再締史上新里程碑。再者，電子類股指數收在2,752點歷史新猷。最後，緯穎漲180元收5,525元，市值攀升至1.02兆元，市值上兆元個股增至17檔，接下來奇鋐、致茂蓄勢待發。

news.Title: Stocks Settle Higher on Iran Peace Hopes and Tech Strength
news.Content:
The S&P 500 Index ($SPX) (SPY) on Friday closed up +0.37%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) (DIA) closed up +0.58%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX) (QQQ) closed up +0.42%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26) rose +0.35%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures (NQM26) rose +0.42%.

Stock indexes settled higher on Friday, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 posting 1-week highs, and the Dow Jones Industrials posting a new all-time high. Stocks were supported by hopes that the US and Iran are moving closer to a peace deal. Also, chipmakers and AI-infrastructure stocks rallied amid the unrelenting enthusiasm for artificial intelligence. In addition, Workday rose by more than +5% to lead software stocks higher after reporting better-than-expected Q1 results and offering a positive outlook.

More News from Barchart

Intuit Is Slashing More Than 3,000 Jobs. Why Wall Street Is Punishing INTU Stock for the AI Pivot.

Stocks Rebound as Crude Oil Falls on Hopes for a US-Iran Deal

Stocks Indexes Turn Green in Afternoon Trade as Oil Prices Retreat

Tired of missing midday reversals? The FREE Barchart Brief newsletter keeps you in the know. Sign up now!

Stocks fell back from their best levels on Friday after the University of Michigan's US May consumer sentiment index was revised lower to a record low, and May inflation expectations were revised upward. Also, hawkish comments from Fed Governor Christopher Waller weighed on stocks when he said he supports making clear that the Fed's next interest rate move is just as likely to be an increase as "inflation is not headed in the right direction."

The University of Michigan’s May US consumer sentiment index was revised lower to a record low of 44.8 (data from 1978), weaker than expectations of no change at 48.2.

The University of Michigan's US May 1-year inflation expectations rate was revised upward to a 9-month high of +4.8% from +4.5%, stronger than the +4.6% expected. Also, the May 5-10 year inflation expectations rate was revised upward to a 7-month high of 3.9%, stronger than expectations of no change at 3.4%.

WTI crude oil prices (CLM26) remain extremely volatile and are susceptible to headlines from the Iran war. Prices whipsawed lower and higher on Friday and finished with modest gains as the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. Crude prices fell into negative territory briefly on Friday following a Reuters report that said Qatar has sent a negotiating team to Tehran in coordination with the US to help secure a deal to end the war. Iran said the latest US proposal has "narrowed the gaps" between the two sides. That proposal suggested a short-term deal that would see Iran open the Strait of Hormuz and the US lift a blockade of Iranian ports, with both sides then going into deeper negotiations over Iran's nuclear program. Also, on Friday, Secretary of State Rubio noted “slight progress” in the negotiations. Late Monday, President Trump said he called off a strike on Iran scheduled for Tuesday after Gulf allies asked for more time to give diplomacy a chance.

Story Continues

Last Wednesday, the International Energy Agency (IEA) said in a monthly report that global oil inventories declined at a rate of about 4 million bpd in March and April, and the market will remain “severely undersupplied” until October even if the conflict ends next month. Goldman Sachs estimates that the current disruption has drawn down nearly 500 million bbl from global crude stockpiles, with the drawdown potentially reaching 1 billion bbl by June.

The markets are discounting a 0% chance of a -25 bp FOMC rate cut at the next FOMC meeting on June 16-17.

Earnings season is winding down, and reports thus far have been supportive of stocks. As of Friday, 83% of the 475 S&P 500 companies that reported Q1 earnings have beaten estimates. Q1 S&P 500 earnings are projected to climb +12% y/y, according to Bloomberg Intelligence. Stripping out the technology sector, Q1 earnings are projected to increase around +3%, the weakest in two years.

Overseas stock markets settled higher on Friday. The Euro Stoxx 50 climbed to a 2-week high and closed up +0.99%. China's Shanghai Composite recovered from a 3-week low and closed up +0.87%. Japan's Nikkei Stock Average rose to a 1-week high and closed up sharply by +2.68%.

Interest Rates

June 10-year T-notes (ZNM6) on Friday closed up +0.5 of a tick. The 10-year T-note yield fell -1.2 bp to 4.558%. T-notes posted modest gains on Friday amid a decline in inflation expectations, as the 10-year breakeven inflation rate fell to a 1-month low of 2.401%. Also, Friday’s downward revision in the University of Michigan US May consumer sentiment index to a record low was supportive for T-notes.

T-notes gave up most of their gains on Friday after Fed Governor Waller said he supports a Fed rate hike if inflation doesn’t soon slow. Also, the upward revision in the University of Michigan’s May inflation expectations rate was bearish for T-notes. In addition, the strength in stocks on Friday curbed safe-haven demand for government debt and is weighing on T-notes.

European government bond yields are moving lower today. The 10-year German Bund yield fell to a 1.5-week low of 3.022% and finished down -6.0 bp to 3.038%. The 10-year UK gilt yield dropped to a 2-week low of 4.887% and finished down -6.8 bp to 4.897%.

The German May IFO business confidence index unexpectedly rose +0.4 to 84.9, stronger than expectations of a decline to 84.2.

The German June GfK consumer confidence index unexpectedly rose +3.3 to -29.8, stronger than expectations of a decline to -34.0.

ECB Governing Council member Alexander Demarco said, "In June, the ECB will probably need to hike interest rates as we need to send a signal that we are committed to our medium-term 2% inflation target."

news.Title: Tesla Is Chasing the Future of Driving. Its Stock Is Stuck in a 350x Earnings Trap
news.Content:
Tesla (TSLA) is one of the hardest stocks to judge in the market. The company still sells electric cars, but the bigger debate is about what it could become. That is why a fresh report that Tesla is ramping up “urgent” hiring for Full Self-Driving (FSD) work in China matters so much. It tells investors the company is still leaning hard into autonomy, even as the electric vehicle (EV) market remains choppy and competition stays intense.

China is the key piece here. It is the world’s biggest auto market, and Tesla has been losing ground there to local players. At the same time, TSLA stock has continued drawing buyers because the market is still willing to pay for the robotaxi, software, and AI story. That keeps Tesla in a strange spot. The near-term business looks uneven, but the long-term pitch still has a lot of power.

More News from Barchart

Crude Oil Prices Tumble on Hopes for Iran Peace Progress

Forecasts for Hot US Temps Boost Nat-Gas Prices

Crude Oil Prices Supported as Iran Peace Deal Remains Elusive

Tired of missing midday reversals? The FREE Barchart Brief newsletter keeps you in the know. Sign up now!

Tesla Stock Still Has Momentum, But It's Not Cheap

Tesla shares have climbed about 25% over the past year, helped by investor excitement around autonomy and AI. TSLA stock stumbled earlier in 2026, then bounced back from its April lows. The stock has also stayed above its 200-day moving average, which suggests the long-term trend remains intact even after some short-term weakness.

The valuation is still rich, however. Tesla trades at a price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of about 346.7 times, which is far above the sector median of roughly 15 times. Its price-to-book ratio is around 18.4 times, compared to a sector median near 2 times.

That is a big premium. Bulls say Tesla deserves it because of its growth optionality and cash generation. Bears say TSLA stock already prices in a lot of success that has not shown up yet.

China Hiring Adds to the FSD Story

The latest China hiring push gives Tesla another reason to stay in focus. The company is posting “urgent” job openings tied to FSD testing, data work, and driver-assistance roles across major Chinese cities. That matters because Tesla has been trying to catch up in a market where local rivals are moving fast on smart-driving features.

Investors generally like the signal. It shows Tesla is not slowing down on autonomy and is still trying to build a global FSD business. But it also shows the challenge. China is not an easy rollout. Regulation is still a hurdle, and Tesla will need execution to turn this hiring push into real progress.

Story Continues

For TSLA stock, the news is supportive because it keeps the long-term growth story alive.

Tesla Q1 Earnings Showed Progress, But Spending Is Rising Fast

Tesla’s March quarter gave bulls and bears something to point to. Revenue came in at $22.39 billion, up 16% from a year earlier. Automotive revenue was $16.23 billion, energy generation and storage brought in $2.41 billion, and services and other revenue reached $3.75 billion. That mix matters because it shows Tesla is getting more out of software and services, not just car deliveries.

Net income attributable to common stockholders was $477 million, up from $409 million a year ago. Adjusted earnings were about $0.41 per share. Free cash flow came in at $1.44 billion, and Tesla ended the quarter with $44.74 billion in cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments. That gives the company a cushion.

There was also a useful sign on autonomy. Tesla said paid robotaxi miles nearly doubled sequentially in the quarter. CEO Elon Musk said that kind of growth supports the idea that autonomy is moving from theory to real usage.

The catch is spending. Tesla now expects capital spending to top $25 billion in 2026. That is a huge figure, and it raises the risk of negative free cash flow later this year. So, the quarter was solid, but it also showed how expensive the next phase could be.

What Do Analysts Think of Tesla Stock?

Wall Street still cannot agree on Tesla. Morgan Stanley has a neutral view and a target of around $415, saying the company’s spending plans and execution risk still matter. Goldman Sachs is also cautious on TSLA stock with a “Neutral” rating and a $375 target. Analysts point to Tesla’s heavy capex and the chance that free cash flow could turn negative for the rest of 2026.

TD Cowen is more upbeat. The firm recently kept a “Buy” rating and a $490 target, arguing that autonomy and robotics could unlock more value over time. Barclays remains more cautious with a target near $360.

Overall, the consensus is a “Moderate Buy” rating with a mean price target of $401.77. Tesla stock has already surpassed that target and is currently moving toward its Street-high target of $600.

That split tells the story. Tesla is still expensive, still controversial, and still tied to a future that is not yet here. For now, though, the market is willing to pay for the China FSD push, the robotaxi dream, and the chance that Musk can turn those bets into something bigger.

news.Content:

The new business will manufacture complete hardware solutions (including quantum processor units/QPUs, cryogenic read-out ICs, and advanced packaging), marking GF’s entry into next-generation high-performance computing.

news.Title: Arm Holdings (ARM), Red Hat Expand Collaboration for Agentic AI Stack
news.Content:
Arm Holdings (NASDAQ: ARM ) is one of the best multibagger stocks to buy in 2026. On May 11, Arm and Red Hat expanded their collaboration to deliver a production-ready AI software and hardware stack tailored for the demands of continuous, always-on agentic AI systems. The solution optimizes Red Hat Enterprise Linux and Red Hat OpenShift for the Arm AGI CPU, providing unified orchestration for cloud-native workloads, microservices, and virtual machines across hybrid cloud and on-premises environments.

The foundation of this infrastructure is the Arm AGI CPU, a data center system-on-chip featuring 136 Neoverse V3 cores, PCIe Gen6, and DDR5 memory. While GPUs lead in AI training, the AGI CPU focuses on resolving bottlenecks in real-time inference, data pre-processing, and orchestration. Operating at an efficient 300W TDP, it can nearly double or even quintuple data center compute density compared to traditional x86 processors, depending on the rack cooling setup.

Supported by major hardware partners like Supermicro, Lenovo, and ASRock Rack, this validated platform brings the total cost of ownership and efficiency benefits of cloud-optimized Arm architecture directly to enterprise data centers. Integrated solutions from Arm Holdings (NASDAQ:ARM) and Red Hat are expected to be available for deployment in Q4 2026.

Arm Holdings (NASDAQ:ARM) is involved in the licensing, research, marketing, and development of system IP, microprocessors, graphics processing units, physical IP, and associated systems IP, software, and tools.

news.Title: Intel (INTC) Introduces Core Ultra Series 3 Processors for Edge AI Robotics
news.Content:
Intel Corporation (NASDAQ: INTC ) is one of the best multibagger stocks to buy in 2026. On May 20, Intel introduced its Core Ultra Series 3 processors, establishing a new system-on-chip standard for Edge AI robotics. By integrating a CPU, GPU, and NPU onto a single piece of silicon, the processor enables multi-agent Physical AI to run entirely on-device. This allows robotics developers to eliminate bulky, expensive, and high-heat discrete GPUs.

Sensory AI has completely transitioned its autonomous barista robot, Ella, to this Intel-only architecture. The change drastically reduces the total cost of ownership while allowing three specialized AI agents to handle customer interaction, business patterns, and safety reasoning simultaneously. The technology will be showcased at the Computex 2026 tradeshow, running complex vision, language, and motion tasks without cloud dependency.

Other global robotics pioneers (including Trossen Robotics in the US, Circulus in South Korea, and Oversonic Robotics in Italy) are also adopting or testing the chip. These companies are using the high-performance integrated compute to power everything from manufacturing arms to zero-latency humanoid robots in healthcare, proving that real-world deployment requires efficient, integrated local processing.

Intel Corporation (NASDAQ:INTC) is a semiconductor company specializing in computing & related end products and services through its CCG, DCAI, and Intel Foundry segments.

news.Title: Bank of America resets Amazon stock forecast on key product launch
news.Content:
Amazon ( AMZN ) is one of the world’s largest online retailers and a hyperscaler thanks to its Amazon Web Services. The key driver for the stock has become artificial intelligence.

The stock is up about 16.31% year to date, at the time of writing, Friday morning, May 22, according to Yahoo Finance . Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 index ( SPY ) is up about 8.92% in the same period.

AI is also driving a change in e-commerce.

Google unveiled Universal Cart at its I/O conference.

OpenAI launched Instant Checkout in September 2025.

Walmart launched Sparky in June 2025. Some investors have seen these announcements as a threat to Amazon's retail.

Amazon has launched its response to these new trends, and Bank of America reacted with an updated, increasingly bullish forecast.

Recent key news for the stock

The company reported strong Q1 earnings .

Amazon invested in OpenAI .

Amazon invested in Anthropic .

Let’s first take a look at what Amazon unveiled.

Amazon launches Alexa for Shopping

Amazon unveiled Alexa for Shopping (AfS) on May 13. It is best described as a merger of Rufus and Alexa+ .

Rufus was launched in February 2024 and is an AI shopping assistant trained on Amazon’s product catalog, customer reviews, community Q&As, and information from across the web.

The company said that over 300 million customers have used Rufus in 2025. Amazon reported in November 2025 that customers who use Rufus during shopping are 60% more likely to complete a purchase.

AfS combines Rufus’ product expertise and Amazon shopping history with the personalized knowledge and context of Alexa+.

It works across a wide range of surfaces and devices, including the Amazon Shopping app, website, and Echo Show, enabling customers to browse and shop the full Amazon store using voice, touch, or both.

“Alexa for Shopping is like having an expert personal shopper who already knows you and remembers your preferences, your past purchases, and your conversations, and carries that knowledge and understanding of you across your phone, laptop, and Echo devices,” stated Rajiv Mehta, vice president of Conversational Shopping at Amazon in the press release.

Investors will see AfS’s scheduled purchases as a key feature, as they have significant potential to drive Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) higher.

Bank of America says Alexa for Shopping will lead to Amazon’s push into the Agentic Era

In a research note shared with me, Bank of America analyst Justin Post and his team updated their opinion on Amazon stock, following the launch of AfS.

Post wrote, “As usage increases, AfS should benefit from a flywheel effect in which better personalization drives higher conversion and incremental engagement.”

Story Continues

The team believes this will drive higher conversion rates than Rufus alone, making AfS a retail sales driver as usage scales. Analysts said that their research on Similarweb data shows that the threat from third-party shopping agents has not materialized yet.

More Tech Stocks:

Analysts reset Broadcom stock price target

Bank of America resets Microsoft stock forecast after earnings

Bank of America resets Google stock forecast before key event

Post said that Rufus generated nearly $12 billion of annualized incremental GMV in Q4 2025, and he believes AfS’s contribution to GMV can grow with usage. He estimates that over the next ten years, AfS can generate nearly $215 billion of incremental GMV by 2035, which could translate into $20 billion of incremental retail profit.

Post reiterated a buy rating for Amazon stock and the target price of $310, based on his sum-of-the-parts analysis that values AWS at 9x 2027 sales estimates, first-party retail at 1.0x, third-party retail at 2.5x, and advertising at 5.0x.

Analysts noted downside risks for Amazon:

Increasing competition from offline and local retailers.

Market share loss to cloud competitors with advanced AI technology.

Elevated AWS investment needs that could pressure margins.

Analysts also said that the stock has been subject to significant volatility in the past, and that volatility could increase amid economic uncertainty.

What do other analysts think, and how does Bank of America’s opinion compare?

According to TipRanks , 45 of the 46 analysts covering Amazon stock rate it a buy. Only one gives a hold rating. The average price target is $319.

Related: Bank of America revamps Nvidia stock price target after earnings

This story was originally published by TheStreet on May 22, 2026, where it first appeared in the Investing section. Add TheStreet as a Preferred Source by clicking here.

While reports about the imminent IPO have been floating around for quite some time now, they seem more credible this time around after the ChatGPT parent defeated Elon Musk’s lawsuit, which alleged that the company strayed from his mission by setting up a for-profit corporation. Musk has vowed to appeal the decision, but the ruling ...
news.AI_Summary:
• OpenAI is reportedly preparing for a confidential IPO filing, which could be one of the largest ever and will test the market's appetite for AI stocks.
• Microsoft (MSFT) holds over a quarter stake in OpenAI, and concerns about OpenAI losing ground to competitors like Anthropic and Google Gemini have impacted MSFT's stock.
• Recent amendments to the OpenAI-Microsoft agreement include Microsoft remaining the primary cloud provider but with non-exclusive IP licensing and modified revenue share terms.
• OpenAI is a significant cloud customer for Microsoft, representing 45% of its remaining performance obligations (RPO), and its IPO could provide capital for Azure compute services and monetize Microsoft's investment.
news.Keywords: OpenAI IPO, Microsoft investment, cloud provider, AI competition, RPO, valuation

news.Content: Cisco Systems CSCO is benefiting from an accelerating demand for AI infrastructure and enterprise networking modernization, which drove fiscal third-quarter 2026 results. The company reported record quarterly revenues of $15.8 billion, up 12% year over year, while product revenues increased 17% year over year to $12.1 billion. Networking remained the primary growth engine, with networking product revenues rising 25%, fueled by AI infrastructure deployments and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cisco Systems reported record quarterly revenues of $15.8 billion, up 12% year-over-year, driven by AI networking demand.
• Networking product revenues surged 25% year-over-year, fueled by AI infrastructure and campus modernization.
• AI infrastructure orders from hyperscalers reached $1.9 billion, with full-year expectations raised to $9 billion.
• The company expects continued strong AI networking demand across hyperscalers, enterprises, and telecom customers.
news.Keywords: AI networking, enterprise modernization, hyperscaler demand, revenue growth, order backlog

news.Title: Sandisk Stock Is Up 3,126% Since August. Wall Street Is Confident That More Upside Is Ahead.
news.Content: Up about 3,126% since August, shares of SanDisk (SNDK) still offers plenty of upside opportunity. According to analysts at Citi, the tech giant could rally more than 50% higher to $2,025. All thanks to strong storage demand, a strong pricing environment, and unending interest in artificial intelligence. In addition, as noted by the firm, signed long-term agreements could provide gross margins of more than 80% moving forward. More News from Barchart Intuit ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SanDisk (SNDK) stock has seen substantial gains (3,126% since August) and analysts at Citi project over 50% further upside.
• Strong storage demand, a favorable pricing environment, and sustained AI interest are driving growth, with potential for gross margins exceeding 80% due to long-term agreements.
• The NAND market is expected to remain undersupplied through 2026-2027 due to massive AI data center demand, benefiting pure-play leaders like SanDisk.
• The company announced a $6 billion buyback program and reported strong Q4 earnings with revenue of $5.95 billion, up 252.1% year-over-year.
news.Keywords: NAND flash, storage demand, AI data centers, gross margin, buyback program, supply/demand

news.AI_Summary:

• The firm's optimism is based on strong pricing power, evidenced by gross margins rising to 80% from 26.4% a year ago, and efficient management of high demand.
• A $6 billion stock buyback program is seen as confirmation of the company's belief in its undervaluation at current levels.
• SanDisk reported Q3 2026 revenue of $5.95 billion, a 251% year-over-year increase, with non-GAAP gross margin at 78.4% and non-GAAP EPS of $23.41.

news.Title: SoftBank Stock Spikes as OpenAI Prepares for Historic IPO
news.Content: Nvidia (NVDA) posted another blockbuster earnings report, firing up enthusiasm across the entire AI sector. And OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT, moved closer to what could be the most anticipated tech initial public offering in years. SoftBank (SFTBY) sits at the center of both stories. news.Title: Is This AI Data Center Stock a Buy While the Market Panics About Oversupply?
news.Content: The market is entering a new era and a new debate around artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure. After two years of relentless capacity additions and money being thrown at AI, some analysts are warning about a potential oversupply of data center power and cooling capacity, especially in the back half of 2026 and into 2027. That worry has weighed on the share prices of the pick-and-shovel names that benefited most from the ongoing data center ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Concerns about potential data center oversupply in late 2026/2027 are weighing on infrastructure stocks like Vertiv.
• Vertiv's backlog remains strong at approximately $15 billion, driven by demand for liquid cooling and critical power solutions.
• Hyperscaler capital expenditures are projected to exceed $700 billion in 2026, raising sustainability questions.
• Rising AI cluster densities and the increasing adoption of liquid cooling are expected to sustain demand for Vertiv's products.
news.Keywords: data center, AI infrastructure, liquid cooling, capital expenditures, supply/demand balance

news.Title: Broadcom Rides on Accelerating Semiconductor Revenues: What's Ahead?
news.Content: Broadcom’s AVGO reported robust semiconductor growth in the first quarter of fiscal 2026, driven by strong demand for AI infrastructure solutions from hyperscale customers. Semiconductor solutions revenues rose 52% year over year to $12.52 billion and accounted for nearly 65% of total revenues, which increased 29.5% year over year to $19.31 billion. AI semiconductor revenues were the primary growth driver. AI revenues more than doubled year over year, reflecting continued investments by cloud and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Broadcom reported robust semiconductor growth, with revenues up 52% year-over-year to $12.52 billion, driven by AI infrastructure demand.
• AI revenues more than doubled year-over-year, with networking revenues climbing 60% and custom AI accelerators (XPUs) surging 140%.
• Broadcom expects semiconductor revenues to grow 76% year-over-year to $14.8 billion in Q2 FY26, with AI revenues projected at $10.7 billion.
• The company faces competition from NVIDIA and AMD in the AI semiconductor market.
news.Keywords: semiconductor revenues, AI infrastructure, networking solutions, custom silicon, growth outlook

news.AI_Summary:

• Google argues the judge made legal errors and that its default search engine deals did not prevent competitors from being promoted.
• The company claims it achieved market dominance through innovation and superior product development.
• The Department of Justice is expected to file its arguments in July, and the ruling could impact data sharing with competitors like OpenAI.
news.Keywords: antitrust, monopoly, search advertising, legal appeal, market dominance

news.Title: Elon Musk's new Tesla update is a joy for customers and investors
news.Content: Tesla has been losing ground in one of its most strategically important markets. Domestic rivals have been faster, cheaper, and increasingly more capable on the software features that matter most to buyers there. The company has known this. So have investors. On May 21, Tesla did something about it. And the timing of the move is as significant as the move itself. What Tesla announced and the timing that makes it significant Tesla posted on X on May 21, confirming that its Full Self-Driving Supervised system is now available in China, making it one of ten markets where the software ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's Full Self-Driving (FSD) Supervised system is now officially available in China, a strategically crucial market.
• The launch follows Elon Musk's visit to Beijing and is seen as a significant move to counter domestic rivals offering advanced software features.
• China's EV market is highly competitive, with domestic automakers setting a high technical bar for autonomous driving features.
• Tesla's domestic sales declined 15.05% year-over-year in the first four months of 2026, making the FSD launch more urgent.
• The FSD Supervised system requires driver supervision and is distinct from the fully autonomous Robotaxi service; pricing in China is 64,000 yuan ($9,400) for a one-time purchase.
news.Keywords: autonomous driving, market entry, competitive landscape, software deployment, EV sales

news.Title: USTR Greer sees no immediate chip tariffs but says protection important for sector
news.Content: By David Shepardson and David Lawder MANASSAS, Virginia, May 22 (Reuters) - U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said on Friday there were no imminent new U.S. ‌tariffs expected to be imposed on semiconductors, but that it was ...
news.AI_Summary:
• U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer stated there are no imminent new semiconductor tariffs but emphasized the importance of protectionist duties for reshoring chip production.
• Any tariffs under the Section 232 investigation must be properly sequenced to promote U.S. output, with no immediate tariffs expected.
• The U.S. currently manufactures only about 10% of its required chips, highlighting reliance on foreign supply chains.
• Micron Technology is expanding U.S. investments by $30 billion, with planned total investments reaching $200 billion.
• Micron has begun 1-alpha DRAM wafer manufacturing in Virginia, a critical component for AI models, supported by a $6.2 billion government subsidy.
news.Keywords: semiconductor tariffs, reshoring, supply chain, government subsidies, manufacturing

news.Title: This Healthcare Giant Is Quietly Becoming an AI Powerhouse
news.Content: After a very difficult 2025, UnitedHealth Group (NYSE: UNH) has rebounded sharply in 2026, and artificial intelligence (AI) is a contributing factor to its recovery. Health insurance is an increasingly complex business that requires processing reams of data on benefits and claims, cost estimates, care and provider options, prescriptions, and wellness plans, among other things. And UnitedHealth is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• UnitedHealth Group (UNH) is leveraging artificial intelligence (AI) to drive its recovery, with its stock up approximately 53% since March.
• The company introduced 'Avery', a generative AI chatbot that assists 6.5 million members with benefits, claims, and care coordination, with plans to expand to over 20 million members.
• Over 1,000 AI applications are in use across UNH's units, with an additional $1.6 billion investment planned for AI this year.
• First-quarter results beat expectations, with revenue and earnings exceeding Wall Street's forecasts, and full-year 2026 guidance increased to $18.25 per share.
• The medical benefit ratio improved to 83.9% (down from 84.8% a year ago), and Medicare Advantage payments are set to increase by 2.48% in 2027.
news.Keywords: AI adoption, healthcare data, operational efficiency, earnings growth, regulatory tailwinds

news.Title: NuScale Power Stock Is Impossible to Ignore Right Now. Here's What to Do With It.
news.Content: It's hard to know what to make of NuScale Power (NYSE: SMR) stock at the moment. On one hand, the company has access to some of the biggest growth tailwinds the market currently offers. The company has the potential to directly benefit from the rapid rise of artificial ...
news.AI_Summary:
• NuScale Power (SMR) is positioned to benefit from the AI boom due to its nuclear technology's potential to meet data center energy demands.
• However, the company has yet to successfully build and commercialize its small modular reactors (SMRs), with its business model remaining largely theoretical.
• Despite interest and project pipelines, NuScale faces significant hurdles in financing and constructing projects, such as a $6-7 billion project in Romania.
• While a partner secured $25 billion in government funding for a project with the Tennessee Valley Authority, funding flow to NuScale is unclear.
• The company will likely require debt, subsidies, and shareholder dilution to remain operational until projects generate revenue, potentially by 2030 or beyond.
news.Keywords: energy demand, data centers, SMR technology, project financing, speculative investment

news.Title: Amazon allegedly made millions from this now illegal policy
news.Content: If it seems like everything is expensive these days, it might not be just because of inflation . When tariffs were raised, those costs were either passed onto consumers or companies. And now that some of the tariffs from the past year have been deemed unconstituitional, companies want their money back. Except, allegedly, Amazon. Tariff lawsuits abound President Donald ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon faces a class-action lawsuit alleging it made hundreds of millions of dollars from illegal tariffs and refused to pass refunds to customers.
• The lawsuit claims Amazon raised prices on imported goods to cover tariffs, which were later deemed unconstitutional by the Supreme Court.
• Thousands of companies have sued the U.S. government for tariff refunds following the Supreme Court ruling that the taxing power belongs to Congress.
• The lawsuit alleges Amazon is withholding refunds to curry favor with former President Trump, rather than for a lack of legal basis.
• This legal challenge suggests Amazon may have to return significant funds collected from consumers due to invalidated tariffs.
news.Keywords: tariff lawsuit, consumer refunds, unconstitutional tariffs, legal liability, retail pricing

news.Title: A Record Backlog and Rising Margins Haven't Stopped Parsons' Nearly 40% Slide
news.Content: The stock market hates uncertainty, and Parsons Corp . (NYSE: PSN) is serving it up. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Parsons Corp. (PSN) stock has fallen nearly 40% in six months due to uncertainty, including losing a $12.5 billion FAA contract bid and the wind-down of a large government contract.
• Despite declining revenue expectations, the company achieved record-high margins in the first quarter, and its backlog reached a new high of $9.3 billion.
• The federal solutions segment saw 13.5% year-over-year revenue growth in its defense and intelligence division, driven by high-tech government spending.
• The critical infrastructure segment is benefiting from the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act and Middle East projects.
• While profitability is improving, cash flow is strained by collection delays, particularly in the Middle East, and the impact of the Iran conflict adds uncertainty.
news.Keywords: contract loss, backlog growth, margin expansion, cash flow strain, risk-reward profile

news.Title: 扭轉近期震盪局面 台股改寫收盤新高價
news.Content:
【記者柯安聰台北報導】在題材面加溫、美股反彈的帶動下，週五（5/22）台股大漲899.76點，上漲2.18%，指數終場收在42267.97點，改寫收盤歷史新高價；本週台股週線收紅，大漲2.66%，全週上漲1095.61點，平均日均量1.1兆元。

雖然收盤再創高點，但3大法人本週動向出現分歧，僅有投信法人站在買方，連續第5週加碼502.13億元，外資與自營商雙雙站在賣方，外資連續2週賣超186.39億元，自營商第5週減持167.75億元，3大法人合計買超147.99億元。

玉山科技島基金經理人王偉哲指出，週五加權指數收盤價再度創下歷史高點，反映出台股基本面強勢以及AI趨勢依舊在軌道上，經過幾日拉回整理後，台股技術面隨著市場題材再度轉強，包括6月2日Computex展即將登場，屆時輝達黃仁勳兆元宴、AMD蘇姿丰來台演說等科技題材將再度吸引盤面資金，市場資金有望聚焦AI浪潮。

此外，王偉哲表示，美伊談判再度出現曙光，油價隨著回落，讓通膨疑慮暫緩，美股也隨之展現反彈攻勢，激勵台股電子股同步轉強，加上近期回檔讓指數乖離率有所修正，有利於台股後市持續走高，強勢族群亦可望續強。

王偉哲分析，多元化Agentic AI應用加速落地，持續推升市場算力需求，根據大摩預估，隨著雲端基礎建設容量陸續釋放，相關供應鏈營收成長將延續加速及高速成長。此外，市場對於半導體展望持續上修，晶圓龍頭大廠近期於技術論壇中表示至2030年全球半導體市場規模將超過1.5兆美元，相較先預估的1兆美元大幅上修，大摩除有相同預估外，更評估1.5兆美元中一半將來自AI半導體，年複合成長率(CAGR)高達38%，因此對科技產業看法持續保持樂觀。

針對台股投資，王偉哲認為，市場展望無虞但仍須留意指數可能出現高檔震盪，且考量通膨維持高檔，聯準會降息機率顯著下降可能導致股市震盪加劇，建議透過減碼評價偏高漲多個股，同時加碼營運展望正向且成長性明確之個股，以優化持股表現；另外可因應類股輪動，以科技成長股為布局主軸，可特別聚焦半導體測試、光通訊產業，並加碼電子零組件、電力電機等。（自立電子報2026/5/22）

news.Title: 波動爆發都勝台積電！ 他想改投「這檔ETF」內行人網搖頭了
news.Content: 台股漲勢強勁，尤其是 台積電 （2330）受到許多投資人青睞。不過，有網友近期觀察到統一台股增長（00981A）爆發力比台積電更強，考慮是否轉換投資標的，引發熱議。 有網友表示，自己過去只要其他股票獲利，最後大多還是會把資金轉回台積電，主要是因為看好台積電的的產業地位、競爭優勢與相對抗跌特性。不過，他近期發現，不少熱門股與主動式ETF漲勢更強，也讓他開始思考，是否該把部分資金改投入主動統一台股增長（00981A）。他表示，00981A成分股涵蓋不少市場熱門標的，波動與爆發力都比台積電更強，若行情持續偏多，短期績效可能更有機會勝出。雖然波動較大，但因為仍屬ETF產品，相較直接追高個股，心理壓力似乎又小一些，也讓他開始認真考慮是否調整配置方向。 ▼原PO表示，過去習慣把股票獲利資金轉投至台積電，但近期發現ETF的00981A波動與爆發力都比台積電更強，考慮是否調整配置。（圖／東森新聞資料照） 此話題吸引許多網友留言討論，有網友先分析兩者的特點，認為台積電本身定位偏向穩健長線，而00981A則更偏向積極型操作，兩者屬性不同，投資前要先考慮好自己的風險承受能力與投資目標。至於原PO未來的布局方式，不少人建議原PO不用在台積電與00981A兩者間做二選一的「全押式選擇」，建議乾脆兩邊都配置：「都買就不用糾結」、「真的想試就先換一部分」，也有人建議，如果只是擔心錯過行情，也可以採取分批布局的方式，而不是一次全面轉換持股。 ▼有網友建議原PO未必要二選一，可以台積電與00981A都買一部分。（示意圖／取自 pixabay ） 另外，還有人提醒原PO，若只是因為台積電近期漲輸其他標的就急著換股，很容易變成「追高殺低」，未必真的划算，還有可能得不償失：「通常你一換，原本那檔就開始漲」、「換來換去最後反而賺不到」。 （封面圖／東森新聞資料照）

• This phenomenon, dubbed the 'Google effect,' is driving investment and recovery in a historically significant but neglected part of the city.
• Google plans to eventually purchase the Thompson Center, signaling a long-term commitment to the area, similar to JPMorgan Chase's nearby renovation.
news.Keywords: Urban Redevelopment, Real Estate Investment, Tech Hub, Commercial Leasing, Economic Impact

news.Title: 瘋台股更求穩健！逾4成上班族去年靠2種股票獲利 擁380萬資產才感到「安全」
news.Content:
據 1111 人力銀行調查指出，雖然台股不斷創高，但領固定薪資的上班族投資風格仍趨向保守穩健。其中 37.5% 偏好 ETF 或基金等穩健型投資，36.1% 以存款為主，高風險操作比例則不到 1 成，逾 4 成受訪者 2025 年曾在股市中獲利，平均獲利金額達 15 萬 5702 元，且目前最看好 AI 與半導體概念股。調查也顯示，上班族平均必須擁有約 380 萬元流動資產才具備安全感，其中 41 至 50 歲的中年族群因家庭責任與退休規劃，對資產門檻需求明顯提高。

調查進一步發現，在高物價時代下，有 21.9% 的受訪者每月勉強收支打平、沒有餘裕儲蓄，另外更有近 2 成上班族處於負債還款中。有餘裕存錢者平均每月可存 9809 元，每月可投入投資的金額平均則為 8787 元。

交叉分析顯示，21 至 25 歲剛踏入職場的年輕世代，受限於低薪與高物價，收支打平無餘裕儲蓄的比例最高，達 22.5%；而 31 至 35 歲族群則因面臨房貸、車貸與家庭支出等現實壓力，負債還款比例最高，達 22.2%。

關於理財目的，排名第一為追求財富自由占 40.4%，其次為提升生活品質與提早退休準備，顯示上班族希望透過資產累積，降低對單一薪資的依賴。對照調查中有 41.1% 的上班族開拓正職以外的第二收入，來源便以投資收益占比最高，其次為兼職打工與斜槓接案。

1111 人力銀行發言人莊雨潔分析，現代上班族的財務焦慮來自退休金不足、醫療風險與房價負擔等未來不確定感，使理財意識覺醒。面對全球經濟不確定性與通膨壓力，多數上班族最擔心的投資風險包括遭遇詐騙、失業導致收入中斷以及經濟衰退。上班族對投資態度更趨保守，優先確保現金流，最在意的其實是能不能撐得久，而非追求高風險高報酬。

news.Title: 台股4月漲7203點激勵散戶信心　證券劃撥存款餘額創高
news.Content:
（中央社記者趙敏雅台北2026年05月22日電）台股4月大漲7203.64點，激勵相關金融指標同步登高。央行今天公布有「散戶投資信心風向球」之稱的證券劃撥存款餘額，4月增至新台幣4兆3028億元，改寫歷史新高，月增3742億元，創下歷年最大增量；日平均成交值、月平均股價指數也刷新紀錄。

人工智慧（AI）熱潮延續，台股4月驚驚漲，狂飆7203.64點，寫下史上最強月線，金融市場樂觀氣氛濃厚。

中央銀行今天公布4月金融概況，貨幣總計數M1B及M2年增率各為8.25%及6.45%，主要是資金淨匯入，加以放款與投資年增率上升所致，分別寫下民國111年6月以來、112年9月以來新高。而M1B年增率持續超越M2，維持「黃金交叉」格局，顯示市場資金動能充裕，有利於股市。

央行經研處副處長葉盛表示，4月台股表現亮眼，帶動多項指標改寫紀錄，月底證券劃撥存款餘額4兆3028億元，較3月大增3742億元，均創下新高紀錄，股票市場融資金額月底餘額升至6385億元，也是歷史新高。4月日平均成交值8755億元、月平均股價指數36644點，雙雙締造新猷。

觀察集中市場交易比重，4月自然人占比微升至53%、本國法人降至10.7%、外資升至36.3%。葉盛指出，「股市太好，交投很熱」，3者成交金額均增加，只是自然人與外資增加幅度較大，使其比重上升。其中，本國自然人成交金額衝破20兆元，續創新高，外資也同創歷史高點，達13.8兆元。

央行統計，4月外國人新台幣存款餘額升至2215億元，創113年9月以來新高。葉盛分析，股市行情熱絡時，外資可能為進出市場，暫泊較多資金。

至於外匯存款期底餘額重新站回9兆元大關之上，升至9兆1449億元，為114年11月以來新高。葉盛指出，台灣經濟基本面良好，出口表現穩健，廠商將資金暫泊外匯存款。

However, when looking at the fundamentals of these two businesses, there seems to be much more hope in science fiction projects ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Amazon Web Services (AWS) revenue grew 28% year-over-year to $37.6 billion last quarter, with a 35% operating margin, generating $48 billion in operating income over 12 months.

news.Keywords: Cloud Computing, E-commerce, Earnings Power, Market Cap Growth, Fundamental Analysis

news.Title: 台股42267點收盤新高 週線漲逾千點 「國家養」將添活水
news.Content:
台北股市今天(22)日在美股續揚、台積電ADR走強激勵下，延續前一個交易日反彈氣勢，加權指數開高走高，終場大漲899點，站上42000點，收42267點收盤新高。週線收漲1095點。投信法人認為，總統提出「國家養計劃」，部分資金將納入「兒少未來帳戶」規劃，將持續為台股添活水。

超微AMD日前宣布將在台投資超過100億美元，並點名日月光投控、力成等台廠合作夥伴，透過擴大策略合作，提升下一代AI基礎設施所需的先進封裝製造產能，消息激勵台系封測族群走強；另外，AI帶動玻纖布及銅箔基板(CCL)需求強勁，相關概念股也隨台股大漲。封測、面板、PCB與AI概念股步調一致，台股22日逾百檔亮燈漲停，帶動市場多頭氣勢，加權指數終場大漲899點，收42267點，改寫歷史收盤新高，成交值約新台幣1.18兆。台股週線翻紅，上漲1095點。

賴清德總統日前提出「0到18歲國家養」計畫，預期將針對0到18歲國民提供每人每月5,000元的成長津貼；並期望孩子6至18歲，家長能夠將其中一半2500元，放入政府成立的「成長基金」戶頭中，預估年滿18歲青年，將有一筆36萬可利用的現金資源。

野村投信策略暨行銷處資深副總張繼文指出，「0到18歲國家養」計畫，有助於台灣版的TISA(台灣個人投資儲蓄帳戶)擴大，長線來看，對於台股資金活水有很大的助益。張繼文說：『(原音)這個金額不管多少 ，其實它是不能動用的，它是會用透過定期定額的方法 ，鎖定在所謂相關的標的 ，如果是透過TISA帳戶 鎖定在優質的標的 ，會帶來給投資人比較好的一個情況就是 ，這個資金的流入對股市的穩定度是高的，它並不是一個短線資金的炒作 。這個部分來講，會對長線台股資金活水 ，是一個很大的正面助益。』

國泰投信也指出，「國家養」計畫除了用於日常開銷或繳納學費，也是培養孩童從小儲蓄、建立財商的絕佳契機，家長可協助孩子及早擬定長期理財策略，透過定期定額布局主動式ETF，全面捕捉台股市場的強勁成長動能。

匯市部分，本週在台股下半場轉強下，新台幣匯價也呈現走升，22日一度走升至31.4元價位，終場小升2.7分，收31.568元。以週線來看，累計單周仍呈現貶值，貶值1.7分或0.05%。(編輯：許嘉芫)

news.Title: 台驊總座：台股大漲財富僅聚集3%的人身上 憂台股網路泡沫歷史重演
news.Content:
過往被投資人稱「最懂海的男人」的台驊 (2636-TW) 創辦人暨總經理顏益財今 (22) 日指出，這次股市「有點像 2000 年的網路泡沫」，且台股大漲財富聚集在僅約 3% 的人左右，憂心「一般老百姓很慘」。

顏益財指出，這次股市的飆風有點像 2000 年，憂心如果發生當時的網路泡沫情形大回檔，「很多人會很慘」。

顏益財不諱言，其實現在台灣面臨很大的危機，原因在於財富聚集在約 3% 的人身上，「一般老百姓很慘，且若股市崩跌都是散戶被套」。

至於 AI 的發展，顏益財則表示，這個領域「不是我專業，我不敢說」。

由於美以伊戰爭的後續不確定性高，顏益財認為，戰爭牽涉種族和宗教，不會很早結束，形成「紅海 2.0」，供應鏈瓶頸漫延效應逐漸顯現，預料運價短期有機會大漲，第二季和傳統第三季旺季具高能見度，第四季後則要看地緣政治的變化。

news.AI_Summary:

• China's vehicle exports to the Middle East fell 60% in March due to the conflict, but increased sales to Europe compensated for this decline.
• BYD's ability to pivot quickly is attributed to its export-focused factories and cost-competitive production, demonstrating resilience in its global EV business.

news.Title: 台股本週大漲1095點　上市公司總市值衝137.8兆元
news.Content:
（中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年05月22日電）台股本週先蹲後跳，週五集中市場指數收在42267.97點，週漲1095.61點或2.66%，創收盤指數新高。根據台灣證券交易所統計，上市公司總市值達到新台幣137兆8811億元，較上週增加約3.58兆元。

產業別指數方面，本週漲幅最大為光電類指數上漲10.60%，跌幅最大為食品類指數下跌3.13%。其他未含金融類指數上漲1060.53點，漲幅約2.84%，未含電子類指數上漲203.59點，漲幅約1.01%，未含金融電子類指數上漲210.54點，漲幅約1.50%。

本週全體上市股票成交金額5兆958億元，成交金額前3名產業分別為半導體類1兆9449億元，占全體上市股票交易金額比重38.17%，電子零組件類1兆1863億元，占比23.28%，光電類成交金額3869.92億元，占比7.59%。

另外本週集中市場股票成交量週轉率4.24%，成交量週轉率前3名產業分別為光電類20.53%、電子零組件類14.56%、玻璃陶瓷類9.5%。

累計今年初開盤迄今共90個交易日，集中市場總成交金額81兆7335億元，市場日平均成交金額9081.51億元，股票成交量週轉率75.71%，股票日平均成交量週轉率0.84%。

news.Title: 外資買超761億元史上第4大 2天爆買1364億元 拱台股首度收盤站上4萬2
news.Content:
台股今 (22) 日及大型權值股、被動元件、高頻高速材料類股的出頭之下，大盤終場站上 4 萬 2 大關 ，以上漲 899.76 點收盤，指數報收 42267.97 點，成交值 1.18 兆元，外資連兩日擴大買超，今天外資買超 761.37 億元，爲史上第四大單日買超金額 ，累計連 2 個交易日外資加碼台股達 1364.78 億元。

但外資連續 3 個交易日大幅賣超第一金 (2892-TW) 27.82 萬張，今天調節 6.94 萬張，連續 3 天位居外資賣超第一。

今天在現貨市場上外資買超 761.37 億元，投信買超 110.64 億元，自營商買超 194.76 億元，合計買超 1066.77 億元；在期貨市場上，外資今天交易淨額爲空單 2059 口，未平倉口淨額爲空單 46483 口。

在匯市方面，新台幣兌美元匯率 5 月 22 日以 31.568 元作收、升值 2.7 分，成交金額 18.8 億美元。上午新台幣以 31.560 元開出，盤中最高 31.454 元，最低 31.581 元。本周貶幅 0.05%。

今天集中市場外資買超較多的個股爲，台玻、緯創、華通、友達、國泰金、彩晶、長興、燿華、仁寶、鴻海；賣超較多的個股爲，第一金、聯電、台新新光金、永豐金、南茂、中鋼、南亞、南金、統一、華航。

今天集中投信買超較多的個股爲，台新新光金、廣達、長榮航、華南金、兆豐金、統一、長榮、凱基金、台灣大、臻鼎 - KY；賣超較多的個股爲，聯電、仁寶、國泰金、富邦金、元大金、遠東新、玉山金、金寶、京元電子、中信金。

今天集中自營商買超較多的個股爲，友達、群創、華通、華邦電、華新、康舒、英業達；賣超較多的個股爲，大成鋼、中信金、永豐金、元大金、華南金、玉山金、廣達、淩陽、大聯大、凱基金。

資深證券分析師簡伯儀指出，若未來交易量能有效放大，台股將有極大機會突破前波高點。在操作策略上，只要指數能穩守在月線之上，建議投資人應保持偏多操作的積極態度，其中中小型股較有機會表現。

news.Title: 台股創收盤新高42267點！大漲899點　多檔ETF創新高價
news.Content:
美股持續反彈，台股掌握時機，再度發動攻勢，今天盤中最高上漲989點，收盤仍大漲899點，擠入史上單日收盤第10大漲點紀錄，漲幅2.18%，指數收在42267點，改寫收盤新高紀錄，首次站上4萬2千點關卡。

整週來看，台股先下後上，週線收紅，單週大漲2.66%，上漲1095點，平均日均量1.1兆元。

三大法人本週動向分歧，僅投信法人站在買方，連續第5週買進，單週加碼502.13億元，外資與自營商雙雙站在賣方，外資連續2週賣超，本週賣超186.39億元，自營商第5週減持，賣超167.75億元，三大法人合計買超147.99億元

台股再創收盤新高，台股ETF也是一片漲聲，包括摩根投信首檔台股主動式ETF：主動摩根台灣鑫收（00401A），今天盤中創新高價13.1元，收盤13.08元，大漲2.83％；兆豐投信旗下首檔台股主動式ETF：主動兆豐台灣豐收（00996A）今日收在掛牌以來最高價14.62元。

此外，復華台灣科技優息（00929）、FT臺灣Smart（00905）、元大高股息（0056）、富邦特選高股息30（00900）、大華優利高填息（00918）等等，也都改寫歷史新高價。

00401A產品經理陳柏翰表示，台股昨日反彈超過千點，今日在超微宣布將在台灣投資100億美元於AI產業鏈之後，再次上漲將近900點，台灣在AI的硬體供應實力再次獲得市場青睞，尤其許多台廠在全球AI基礎建設站穩關鍵地位，從基礎材料、先進製程、封裝測試、系統組裝與機櫃製造等，台廠都具備完整的AI生態鏈，自然也會同步帶動企業獲利成長及股市的強勁表現。 00401A 投資組合主要持股中，包括晶片設計廠商的聯發科、晶片測試設備廠的鴻勁、印刷電路板(PCB)的臻鼎-KY等，據公開資料，近一周股價上漲均達雙位數。

此外，在00401A佔比約10%的低軌衛星族群，更是促使00401A從5月12日至5月20日間表現相對抗跌的關鍵之一。

兆豐00996A經理人王仲良指出，台灣企業今年獲利預估可能迎來超過30%以上的強勁成長。在全球雲端服務供應商資本支出擴大，以及下月即將登場的Computex展、AI 巨頭來台催動話題下，長線多方趨勢非常明確。AI發展已由「模型訓練」進入「終端推論、實體應用」驅動階段，衍生出龐大的硬體需求，且「外溢」至先進封裝、散熱模組、CPO 光通訊、高階 PCB 及載板等次產業。

00996A第一時間發掘受惠這波關鍵零組件缺貨潮、漲價潮的中小型黑馬股，將權值龍頭的穩定增值（Beta），與中小型超額報酬（Alpha）完美結合的雙軌配置，是00996A能夠相對強勁的核心密碼。

展望後市，兆豐投信認為台廠作為全球 AI 產業鏈的核心供應商，產業爆發力不容小覷，面對台股衝上42000點的高檔震盪與快速輪動常態，佈局選股靈活、能精準穿透上市與上櫃產業鏈的主動式ETF，將是長線參與台股大行情並兼顧波動風險的佈局首選。

玉山科技島基金(原：PGIM保德信科技島基金)經理人王偉哲指出，台股收盤指數再創歷史高點，反映台股基本面強勢以及AI趨勢依舊在軌道上，經過幾日拉回整理後，技術面隨著市場題材再度轉強，包括6月2日Computex展即將登場，屆時輝達黃仁勳兆元宴、AMD蘇姿丰來台演說等科技題材將再度吸引盤面資金，市場資金有望聚焦AI浪潮。

王偉哲表示，美伊談判再度出現曙光，油價隨著回落，讓通膨疑慮暫緩，美股也隨之展現反彈攻勢，激勵台股電子股同步轉強，加上近期回檔讓指數乖離率有所修正，有利

news.Title: 台股創高熱錢回流　新台幣盤中挺進31.4元匯價連3升
news.Content:
（中央社記者潘姿羽台北2026年05月22日電）AI題材持續發燒，加上國際油價回落，市場風險偏好升溫，台股激情創高，帶動新台幣匯率連3升，盤中一度挺進31.4元價位，不過午後漲幅收斂，收盤收31.568元，僅小升2.7分，台北及元太外匯市場總成交金額25.215億美元。

油價回落，美股收紅，激勵台股開高走高，指數強彈攻上42000點大關，終場上漲899.76點，收在42267.97點，首次收在42000點關卡之上，創收盤新高。

AI題材火熱，吸引熱錢回流，外資今天狂買台股761.37億元，為歷史第4大買超金額。

新台幣兌美元今天以31.56元開盤後，穩步走揚，午後外資大舉匯入，匯價升抵盤中高點31.454元，勁揚1.41角，不過進口商、政府基金等美元買盤湧現，升幅逐步收斂，加上央行調節，終場收在31.568元，僅小升2.7分。

外匯交易員表示，外資昨天還是雙向操作，今天幾乎是一致性匯入，但央行不樂見新台幣迅速升值，今天略有調節，加上逢低承接的美元買盤不少，使新台幣升幅收斂，整體看來，新台幣匯率升勢跟不上台股漲幅。

新台幣匯率今天收週線，儘管匯價隨台股反彈，本週累計貶值1.7分或0.05%，週線連2黑。

外匯交易員說明，本週新台幣走勢貼著台股，呈現先貶後升，雖然5月以來匯價波動較大，主因是國際局勢多空紛雜，新台幣隨外資進出而波動，續於31.300元至31.700元間盤整；短線而言，新台幣若要向上或向下突破區間，需消息面進一步發展提供動能，事態未明朗之前，延續區間整理格局。

news.Title: 蘇姿丰駁AI泡沫論！神回「現在才打到第三局」
news.Content:
財經中心／李筱舲報導

超微（AMD）執行長蘇姿丰來台拋出震撼彈！她盛讚全球AI與半導體正進入前所未見的高速成長，「每個月都有令人驚喜的成長」，並重申與台灣供應鏈的深度合作。針對外界擔憂的AI泡沫化疑慮，蘇姿丰信心喊話這波熱潮「是真的」，若用棒球來比喻，現在甚至「才打到第三局而已」。

全球唯一高度整合之地！蘇姿丰讚台灣供應鏈生態系

蘇姿丰日前來台參與論壇，她盛讚每次來台都能感受強大能量，並指出台灣擁有全球最完整的半導體生態系，從基礎材料、先進製程到OEM、ODM供應鏈，都能高度整合，更直言「全球真正能做到這件事的地方，就是台灣。」她也透露此次台灣行，已與台積電等逾150家供應鏈夥伴開會，這正是AMD快速成長的關鍵。為滿足未來數年的AI產能需求，AMD近年積極投入CoWoS與3D封裝，且經常是首批導入技術的領頭羊之一。

蘇姿丰拿棒球神比喻AI熱潮，表示現在「才打到第三局而已」。（圖／民視資料照）

AI泡沫化言之過早！蘇姿丰拿棒球神比喻：現在「才到第三局」

談到AI的前景，蘇姿丰將其定位為過去50年來最重要的科技革命，並強調「AI是能讓每個人都受惠的技術」，預言未來3到5年內，生活各層面都將因AI迎來顯著優化。對於市場頻頻敲響的AI泡沫化警鐘，她用棒球局數給出了神比喻，強調AI的發展「現在可能才打到第三局」，她強調，未來仍有極其龐大的開發機會，對前景給予高度的信心。

蘇姿丰宣布將在台灣投資超過100億美元。（圖／民視資料照）

擴大在台研發！蘇姿丰點AI核心：別怕被取代、要學會善用

蘇姿丰指出，AMD在台員工已達1800人，並持續擴點，且大量的研發均在台灣進行。針對全球供應鏈布局，她直言單靠一國無法完成所有半導體生產，多元供應鏈與地緣韌性至關重要，並肯定台積電美廠表現已超乎預期。最後她強調，AI的核心在於提升人類效率，而非取代工作，企業與員工應學會善用工具，同時保持審查與判斷力。

原文出處： 超微執行長蘇姿丰駁「AI泡沫論」！以棒球神比喻「現在才打到第三局」

news.Content: The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) will celebrate its 130th anniversary on May 26. But the historic index looks nothing like it did over a century ago. The Dow of today is chock-full of tech-focused companies, with Salesforce swapping with ExxonMobil in 2020 , Amazon trading places with Walgreens Boots Alliance in 2024, and Nvidia taking Intel 's spot in 2024. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) is predicted to join the Dow Jones Industrial Average in June, potentially reaching a $5 trillion market cap.
• The Dow's composition has shifted towards tech, with recent additions like Amazon and Nvidia.
• Alphabet's stock split in 2022 and its diverse AI, cloud, and media offerings make it a strong candidate for Dow inclusion.
• Honeywell's upcoming spin-offs may create an opening for Alphabet in the price-weighted index.
• The article also mentions a report on a company providing critical technology for Nvidia and Intel.
news.Keywords: Dow Jones inclusion, market capitalization, AI exposure, stock split catalyst, technology sector weighting

news.Title: AI擴廠潮半導體工程大爆單 亞翔：至少忙3年
news.Content:
[ 非凡新聞 ]

AI這波殺手級應用，啟動了全球半導體的瘋狂擴產浪潮，這也讓全世界最會蓋半導體廠的台灣建廠工程設備商忙翻天，包括漢唐、亞翔、帆宣等等訂單接不完，在手的建廠工程案子，從台灣發展到美國、日本、新加玻等東南亞地區，其中工程機電系統整合大廠亞翔表示，這波動能不敢說看到五年後，但3年的好光景絕對沒問題。

重工程機械日夜不停歇，台積電位在新竹寶山的2奈米新廠二期即將在年底完工。而除了台灣，還有美國、新加坡等地，晶圓廠的建置熱潮，讓這些做建廠工程、系統整合的業者全都忙翻天。

亞翔董事長 姚祖驤：「不是只有下半年，我想在這個1、2年之內，大家可能都是非常、非常地忙碌，只有一個『忙』字而已。不要說5年，我想3年應該不是問題。」

受惠AI帶動全球掀起擴廠潮，亞翔董事長說，手上訂單看到2028、2029年，都是滿滿的動能。工程設備相關大廠，漢唐、帆宣也同步受惠。第一季普遍交出了史上最亮眼的成績。亞翔Q1 EPS 9.45元，幾乎賺進一個股本；漢唐更厲害，賺了16.31元；而帆宣5.08元。對下半年展望，大家都很樂觀。

帆宣總經理 林育業：「我想源頭需要的話，後面絕對是會很多啦，很多的需求。業界很多前輩，大家都很努力在做，大家成績都很好（訂單的能見度，您覺得怎樣？）我想應該是1、2年，應該是沒有問題啦。」

帆宣、漢唐等承接不少台積電海外建廠需求，設備代理加上廠務系統雙雙成長。台灣這幾家工程設備系統廠，累積了30多年的功力，絕對是全球第一的專業人才。

亞翔董事長 姚祖驤：「我們現在在手的工程案，尤其是我們現在到新加坡，去新加坡的規模是非常大。新加坡這幾年，我們一共拿了2百多億的新幣，大概5、6千億台幣。」

亞翔總公司在新竹湖口鄉，外觀十分低調，但他們已從台灣走向國際，正積極搶攻全球這一波半導體的擴產競賽。跟著晶圓大廠的腳步，一起走向海外，同時也是這一波AI資本支出，最直接受惠族群。（記者朱月英、姚尹哲／新竹採訪報導）

news.Title: "AI才打到棒球第3局" 蘇姿丰:非常滿意與台積電合作
news.Content:
財經中心／楊思敏、戴亞倫 台北報導

「半導體女王」超微執行長蘇姿丰訪台第三天，出席論壇活動，強調非常滿意與台積電的夥伴關係，更為亞利桑那廠投產成果背書。她多次強調，AI無所不在，駁斥AI泡沫化說法，認為才打到棒球第三局，開剛始而已，這次與台廠供應鏈見面，就是為了確保產能。

超微執行長蘇姿丰：「台灣這裡很有活力，世界上沒有任何一個地方，在一個非常小的區域，就有這麼多半導體。」

蘇姿丰來台出席論壇，大聊AI革命，與台灣的合作關係，最深刻的就是前一晚供應鏈晚宴上，台廠之間的互動，很特別！

蘇姿丰：「所有人都好友善，所有人都愛對方，即使他們互相是競爭者，也不影響，我認為我們是一起成長的，10年以前，人們不太關心半導體，我們的朋友和夥伴們，都非常成功，因為時間對了。」

蘇姿丰在對談活動上，談AI產業前景與台廠夥伴。（圖／民視財經網）

蘇姿丰訪台，宣布投資台灣100億美元，相當於3200億台幣，將擴大先進封裝產能，同時提到超微在台積電美國廠投產順利，很滿意雙方合作關係。

蘇姿丰：「（台積電）持續增加產能，非常非常的幫忙，針對供應鏈部分，我們總是考慮最好的選項，但目前我們對於，與台積電的夥伴關係，非常非常滿意。」

面對AI晶片市場百家爭鳴，她表示，超微產品多元有競爭力，更強調AI沒有泡沫化，是來真的。

蘇姿丰接受媒體訪問。（圖／民視財經網）

蘇姿丰：「（AI）是真的嗎，現在就應該投資這麼多嗎，這當然是真的，AI還在早期階段，我們才打到（棒球）第三局而已，這也代表，還會有很多創新與機會。」

她也被問到如何看待中國市場，因為最近輝達執行長黃仁勳坦承，對於重返中國高階晶片市場，不抱有期待。

蘇姿丰：「我們也沒有將，最高階晶片銷往中國的營收，列進財報預期，這是一個動態變化的市場，有美國出口管制，同時也有中國的規定。」

蘇姿丰先後拜訪中國，再來台灣固樁確保產能，應對變化萬千的AI市場。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

news.Title: Billionaire Bill Ackman Just Dumped Alphabet Stock to Buy These Two AI Stocks. Should Investors Follow Suit?
news.Content: Bill Ackman is one of the world's preeminent investors. He runs a very concentrated portfolio of just a handful of stocks, so when he makes moves, investors tend to pay attention. In Q1, Ackman's Pershing Square Management (NYSE: PS) fund took a huge new stake in Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) while increasing its position in Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) by 19%. To help fund these new purchases, Ackman sold 95% of his stake in fellow ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Billionaire Bill Ackman's Pershing Square fund significantly increased its stake in Microsoft (MSFT) and Amazon (AMZN) in Q1.
• Ackman sold 95% of his Alphabet (GOOGL) holdings to fund these new investments, though he remains long-term bullish on Alphabet.
• He favors Microsoft due to its strong cloud (Azure) and software (Microsoft 365) businesses, and its OpenAI stake.
• Amazon's e-commerce and AWS cloud segments are seen as dominant franchises with long-term growth potential.
• The fund manager believes software companies tied to customer workflows are AI beneficiaries, not losers.
news.Keywords: Portfolio reallocation, hedge fund activity, AI beneficiaries, cloud computing, enterprise software

news.Title: 《陸股》滬指重回4100點、漲0.87%；恆指漲0.86%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-22 17:30:33 新聞中心 發佈

中國滬深兩市三大指數今(22)日集體開高，早盤兩市高檔狹幅震盪，午前的走高延續到午後，三大指數漲幅逐漸擴大；截至收盤，滬指重回4100點，深證成指、創業板指漲逾2%。盤面上，釀酒、券商、保險、銀行等板塊疲弱；相較下，有色、半導體、化工、汽車等板塊走高，PCB概念、CPO概念、玻璃基板、消費電子概念等活躍。今兩市個股漲多跌少，上漲個股逾3,800檔；滬指漲0.87%，日K翻紅。

上證指數今收於4112.90點、漲0.87%；深證成指收於15597.30點、漲2.30%；創業板指收於3938.50點、漲2.84%；科創50收於1790.77點、漲1.51%；中證A500收於6115.18點、漲1.59%。

以週線來看，上證指數本週跌0.54%，深證成指漲0.23%、創業板指漲0.24%、科創50漲5.57%、中證A500漲0.15%。

成交量方面，滬市今成交1兆2,858億元(人民幣,下同)，深市成交1兆6,175億元，兩市成交額達2兆9,033億元，較前一交易日量縮約17%。

從盤面上來看，元件、培育鑽石、PCB概念漲幅居前；白酒、證券、機場航運板塊跌幅居前。

港股方面，香港恆生指數今日開盤上漲1.01%。盤面上，恆生科技指數漲2.11%，作為市場風向標的大型科技股集體反彈，帶動市場情緒回升，網易漲近6%；晶片股持續活躍，兆易創新H股漲近13%；AI應用概念股集體大漲，智譜、五一視界大漲，股價均創歷史新高。另一方面，餐飲股、體育用品股、家電股、內房股多數低迷。恆指終場收於25606.03點、漲0.86%，惟日K連三黑；以週線來看，本週跌1.37%。

《陸股》滬指跌1.02%、日K連二黑；恆指失守26000點

《陸股》滬指漲0.67%攀近11年高；恆指漲0.15%

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 2 Monster Stocks to Hold for the Next 5 Years
news.Content: If you're looking for monster stocks to own for the next five years, you don't have to scour far and wide to find great investments. Let's look at two growth stocks you can buy today and hold at least for the next five years. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon (AMZN) is highlighted as a monster stock for the next five years due to its e-commerce and cloud computing operations.
• The company utilizes over 1 million robots coordinated by its DeepFleet AI model in its fulfillment centers and is expanding into last-mile delivery robots and humanoid robots.
• Amazon Web Services (AWS) is its most profitable segment, with revenue up 28% in Q1, driven by demand for computing power and AI services.
• Amazon is investing $200 billion this year to meet demand, securing large commitments from anchor customers like Anthropic and OpenAI.
• The article also mentions Apple (AAPL) as another potential long-term holding due to its ecosystem and growing services revenue.
news.Keywords: E-commerce, cloud computing, AI infrastructure, robotics, long-term growth

news.Title: 群創友達漲停「雙響炮」台股站穩4萬2新高「面」子十足｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
部分官員聲稱美伊和平談判有進展，儘管雙方對德黑蘭濃縮鈾庫存與荷姆茲海峽控制權仍有分歧，油價回軟帶動美股四大指數21日震盪收高。輝達財報財測亮眼但股價下跌1.77%，壓抑科技股氣氛，不過AI算力租賃題材延燒，CoreWeave、Nebius等Neocloud概念股走強，安謀也大漲16.16%，台積電ADR同步上漲1.38%。

亞股方面，日股大漲2.7%，創收盤新高；韓股上漲0.4%；港股走強0.86%，上證指數則漲0.87%。

回到台股，台股今(22)日開高走高，終場大漲899.76點，收42,267.97點，漲幅2.18%，改寫收盤新高，周線勁揚收紅，成交金額達1兆1884.32億元。權王 台積電(2330) 收2255元，上漲25元；蘇姿丰來台與超微投資台灣供應鏈題材發酵，帶動 聯發科(2454) 、 台達電(2308) 、 英業達(2356) 、 力成(6239) 、 景碩(3189) 等強勢表態，面板、記憶體與被動元件族群同步點火，盤面多達114檔亮燈漲停，資金行情明顯升溫。

📝盤點熱門股：主動統一台股增長、元大台灣50正2、主動群益科技創新

今日熱門成交榜由主動式ETF、面板與記憶體族群包辦人氣焦點，前五名全數收紅。 主動統一升級50(00403A) 以53.86萬張成交量奪下成交王，股價上漲並重新站穩10元發行價，顯示主動式ETF買氣依舊熱絡；另一檔 主動統一台股增長(00981A) 同步價量齊揚，大盤走強之際資金持續湧入台股ETF布局。

面板股方面，雙虎 友達(2409) 、 群創(3481) 亮燈漲停，受惠低價轉型題材與光電族群資金輪動，加上市場看好後續行情，吸引買盤積極卡位。

記憶體族群則由 力積電(6770) 擠進前五，受惠記憶體族群買氣升溫與DRAM題材續強，顯示資金在電子次族群間快速輪動。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計買超1066.77億元，創下近期罕見的千億級買盤回流。外資大舉買超761.37億元，成為推升台股攻高的主要動能；投信同步買超110.64億元，持續偏多布局；自營商也加碼194.76億元，內外資全面站在買方，也讓市場多頭氣氛明顯升溫。

✨本日議題股：超微概念股

盤面聚焦超微概念股，超微董事長蘇姿丰來台再度點燃AI供應鏈熱潮，加上超微宣布將砸下百億美元擴大AI布局，帶動台廠合作夥伴全面狂飆。 英業達(2356) 、日月光(3711)、 力成(6239) 同步亮燈漲停，市場資金積極追捧伺服器與AI供應鏈題材...... 點我看更多

👥台泥股東會：

本日市場話題聚焦 台泥(1101) 股東會，三元能源火災餘波延燒，現場股東砲火猛烈，不僅質疑董監事領高薪、股價表現低迷，也追問綠能與儲能轉型「學費到底要繳多久」。董事長張安平回應，三元火災他願意負全責，但轉型不是「今天投資、明天就賺錢」，強調能源布局需要時間...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

下周一(25日)國際財經焦點，先看美國市場，因陣亡將士追悼日金融市場休市，交易量能與國際資金動向將暫時降溫；歐洲方面，英國適逢春季銀行假日，金融市場同步休市；亞太區方面，韓國因佛誕節補假休市，區域盤勢將以其他主要市場表現為觀察重點；港澳方面，當日暫無特別重大財經事件。

台灣方面，國內焦點包括台北國稅局記者會、台經院發布5月景氣動向調查；企業動態方面，股東會可留意 中興電(1513) 、 金寶(2312) 、 智原(3035) 、 穩懋(3105) 、 環球晶(6488) 、 緯穎(6669) 、 中鼎(9933) 、 世紀鋼(9958) 等重要個股，法說會則聚焦 富邦金(2881) 、 群益證(6005) 、 精聯(3652) 等，金融與電子族群後續營運展望可望牽動盤面資金輪動。

市場變化難捉摸？面對股市的大起大落，總會有看不懂、跟不上、難決策的時刻！ Yahoo財經掃描 每個台股交易日晚間6點上菜，整理市場最重要的財經熱點，從國際財經趨勢、產業焦點到個股異動，迅速掌握投資脈動，帶你快人一步，掌握市場先機。

news.Title: Boom or Bubble? This Is Where Micron Technology Stock Could Be in 5 Years
news.Content: The memory industry has been booming for the past three years, propelled by the proliferation of artificial intelligence (AI), which has created demand for larger, faster memory across multiple applications. Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) has been a major beneficiary of the memory boom. Micron stock has shot up by 935% over the past three years, driven by a big jump in its revenue and earnings. Investors, however, may now be wondering if the memory specialist has now entered bubble territory, especially considering that it has been historically susceptible ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) has benefited significantly from the AI-driven memory boom, with its stock up 935% over three years.
• The demand for larger, faster memory for AI workloads in data centers, particularly High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM), is driving the current cycle.
• HBM revenue is projected to reach $55 billion in 2026 and $130 billion by 2030, with data centers consuming 70% of memory supply.
• Memory manufacturers are prioritizing HBM over DRAM, leading to potential shortages until 2030 due to long fabrication plant lead times.
• Micron returned to revenue growth and profitability in 2024, with a favorable pricing environment expected to sustain its growth.
news.Keywords: Memory market, AI demand, HBM, supply constraints, semiconductor cycle

news.Title: 台積電獲保育共生地認證　台灣半導體企業首例
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年5月22日電）台積電 (2330) 今天舉辦「生態解碼生物多樣性Power Up!」活動，號召員工從北中南加入生態志工行列，並見證台積電成為全台第一家獲得保育共生地認證（OECM）的半導體企業，體現科技與棲地生態共榮精神。

台積電發布新聞稿，財務長暨生態共融計畫指導主管黃仁昭表示，台積電深知維護生態系統與自然環境是邁向永續發展的關鍵。台積電Eco Plus!生態共融計畫已邁入第2年，繼去年打造瀕危動物庇護所成功讓巴氏銀鮈持續繁衍，台積電今年成為全台第一家獲得保育共生地認證的半導體企業。

黃仁昭說，這不僅是對台積電努力的肯定，也代表台積電在推動生物多樣性主流化的道路上，再次樹立了新的里程碑。未來將持續深化這些行動，並攜手產官學各界夥伴讓企業營運與環境共存共榮。

台積電表示，晶圓15A廠在最初規劃時，便特別保留約7至8公頃的綠地，並自發性進行生態物種調查，針對場域棲地進行水域與陸域環境的評估與改善，持續豐富植栽的種類與數量，將廠區營造成近似當地森林樣貌且富生物多樣性的綠帶環境。

2020年起啟動螢火蟲復育計畫，2025年與透過農業部林業及自然保育署台中分署及台中市野生動物保育協會攜手合作復育巴氏銀鮈，創國內首例於廠區內成功復育瀕危物種的企業，不僅數量穩定增加中，可以看到第2代及第3代族群健康成長。

台積電指出，晶圓15A廠為全國首座通過「環境教育設施場所」認證的半導體企業，推廣永續理念，於2018年至2025年期間，已累計吸引將近8000人申請並完成導覽與課程，充分展現台積電在生物多樣性上的承諾及長期投入的成果與影響力。

為促進員工對生物多樣性保育的理解，台積電EcoPlus!生態共融計畫2週年活動同步串聯苗栗、台中與台南3地廠區，以「棲地復育、公民科學」為核心。

台積電表示，棲地復育方面，苗栗場「蝶影森森」透過清理環境及修復植被，提供紫斑蝶乾淨安全的棲息空間；台中場「虎哩友善」推廣友善石虎農作，營造人與動植物共存的環境；台南場「菱聽自然」藉由種植菱角，復育水雉棲地關鍵作物。（編輯：張良知）

news.Title: 超微砸百億美元點火台股！AI鏈狂飆，00401A聚焦高成長台廠受關注
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】主動摩根台灣鑫收(00401A)產品經理陳柏翰表示，儘管台股自5月7日以來就持續震盪，但在昨(21)日大幅反彈超過千點之後，今(22)日在超微宣布將在台灣投資100億美元於AI產業鏈之後，台股指數再次上漲將近900點，進而帶動大盤指數重新站上4萬2,000點關卡。陳柏翰說，因為超微，台灣在AI的硬體供應實力再次獲得市場青睞，尤其許多台廠在全球AI基礎建設中的站穩關鍵地位，從基礎材料、先進製程、封裝測試、系統組裝與機櫃製造等，台廠都具備完整的AI生態鏈，自然也會同步帶動企業獲利成長及股市的強勁表現。在00401A投資組合主要持股中，包括晶片設計廠商的聯發科、晶片測試設備廠的鴻勁、印刷電路板(PCB)的臻鼎-KY等，據公開資料，其近一周的股價上漲均達雙位數。此外，在00401A中佔比約10%的低軌衛星族群，更促使00401A從5月12日至5月20日間表現相對抗跌的關鍵之。另外，作為SpaceX（Starlink）及Amazon（Kuiper）的衛星發射關鍵供應商，昇達科股價在同一期間僅下跌10元，跌幅不到0.01%；而作為衛星地面接收元件的關鍵廠商，啟碁股價在同一期間也僅下跌3元，跌幅同樣也只有0.01%；可見出色的選股能力是00401A淨值能在5月台股震盪期間站上13元的關鍵。

news.Title: AMD Expands Taiwan Capacity as AI Tightens CPU Supply
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Advanced Micro Devices ( AMD , Financials ) is moving to expand production capacity in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is expanding its production capacity in Taiwan to meet higher-than-expected CPU demand, indicating AI growth beyond GPUs.
• CEO Lisa Su stated that the global CPU market is tight, with AMD working with partners to increase supply throughout 2024 and significantly more capacity planned for 2027.
• Demand is driven by AI inferencing and agentic AI, increasing the need for CPUs in data centers and enterprise systems.
• AMD plans to invest over $10 billion in Taiwan's AI sector, focusing on advanced packaging, substrates, and rack-scale AI systems.
• The company is also ramping up production of its Venice CPUs using TSMC's 2-nanometer process technology.
news.Keywords: CPU supply, AI inferencing, data center demand, Taiwan manufacturing, advanced packaging

news.Title: 搶台積電大客戶？三星李在鎔訪台密會聯發科 出狠招拉攏
news.Content:
三星靠著記憶體狂潮扭轉半導體部門的營運困境，如今又想藉此拉抬連年虧損的晶圓代工業務，傳出三星會長李在鎔與多位高層低調訪台，行程之一是拜訪聯發科執行長蔡力行。

會長親自出馬為哪樁？

DIGITIMES報導，李在鎔此行可望與蔡力行等會面。三星挾稀缺記憶體產能優勢條件，積極以「第二供應來源」為訴求，為虧損連連的晶圓代工尋求解方。此舉相當接近過去拉攏高通（Qualcomm）的模式，讓聯發科支持先進製程。

供應鏈認為，超微與特斯拉明知三星良率不佳仍願意下單，就是考量三星手握記憶體優勢，能夠確保HBM與DRAM的產量，且聯發科拿到Google TPU訂單後，配合Google策略下單英特爾先進封裝，也讓三星覺得有機可趁。

挖台積電牆角？危機四伏

三星藉此積極推進晶圓代工業務，但關鍵還是在於良率與規模能否符合客戶期待，目前台積電仍具有顯著優勢，尤其擴大海外設廠後，更能應對地緣政治風險與市場波動。

台積電產能滿載，先前傳出英特爾18A製程（對標台積電2奈米）拿到蘋果訂單，未來蘋果訂單不再由台積電獨攬，特斯拉宣布採用英特爾更先進的14A製程（對標台積電1.4奈米），引發關注。

英特爾的EMIB先進封裝技術，更是讓其能夠與台積電競爭的關鍵。瑞銀分析師認為，英特爾積極推銷EMIB-T先進封裝技術是台積電之外的第二選項，可能有機會爭取到輝達這個重要客戶。

台積電雖為全球晶圓代工龍頭，但後頭追兵來勢洶洶，英特爾以美國製造招牌與不斷提升的實力積極搶進；三星則利用獨特的記憶體優勢打包晶圓代工，顯示科技浪潮下，市場競爭更加詭譎激烈。

news.Title: TSMC Trails 140% AI Rallies As Investors Broaden Chip Bets
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. ( NYSE:TSM ) is still one of Asia's most important AI beneficiaries , but investors are no longer treating it ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Investors are broadening their chip investments beyond TSMC (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.) as AI demand spreads across various hardware segments.
• TSMC shares are up 46% year-to-date, but MediaTek and Samsung Electronics have seen rallies exceeding 140%.
• MediaTek is gaining traction for its work on application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs) with Alphabet.
• Samsung is benefiting from its position as the world's largest memory maker and has joined the $1 trillion market cap club.
• Fund managers are diversifying due to single-stock limits and TSMC's significant weighting in the Taiwan index, looking at other Asian tech names.
news.Keywords: Chip sector diversification, AI hardware, ASIC development, memory market, investment strategy

news.Title: 《韓股》KOSPI收漲0.41%，大型權值股走勢分歧
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-22 16:44:00 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(22)日走勢尚屬穩健。韓國KOSPI指數終場收在7847.71點，上漲32.12點或0.41%；韓國KOSDAQ指數則收在1161.13點，上漲55.16點或4.99%。KOSDAQ指數今日盤中因急漲觸發「sidecar」機制，一度暫停程式化交易。

盤面上，大型權值股走勢分歧，Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)跌2.34%、SK Hynix(000660.KS)微幅上漲；相較之下，三星電機(009150.KS)與部分電池、電子零組件及生技題材在KOSPI指數內表現強勁，成為指數上漲的代表性推手。

KOSPI指數資金流向方面，市場呈現內外資分歧的格局，指數由內資承接支撐而非外資主導。KOSDAQ指數方面，資金由外資與機構同步買超，散戶則大幅淨賣出；資金集中推升成長型與中小型股，EcoPro (086520.KS)、EcoPro BM(247540.KS)、Alteogen(196170.KS)等個股上漲，市場上漲家數明顯多於下跌家數。

《韓股》三大正面因素助攻，KOSPI收漲8.42%

美股焦點：FirstCash(FCFS.US) | 01:45:32(GMT+8)
